event: Arrival of a prince at an Indian palace
description: A large courtyard scene before an ornate Indian palace with elaborate golden-pink facades, arched windows, and decorative columns. An elephant carrying a rider in a howdah enters from the right, attended by figures on foot. In the foreground left, groups of men in turbans and robes stand watching. The architecture is richly detailed with intricate carvings and multi-tiered facades. Bright sunlight illuminates the pale stone buildings against a blue sky.

_meta.title: Arrival of Prince Humbert, the Rahaj, at the Palace of Amber
